chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1338 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 09.10.2017 Mr. Muhammad Ayoub Leghari, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Aziz Ahmed Leghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel = With reference to the notice of the present case, parawise comments/statements on behalf of respondents No.2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 and 8 have been filed, which are taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to the learned Counsel holding brief for petitioner’s Counsel. In the statements the official respondents have vehemently denied the allegations leveled against them by the petitioner in this petition and that the petitioner was never harassed or threatened by the official respondents. It is also stated in the comments that the present petition is the counter blast on account of the cases registered against the relatives of the petitioner. It is further stated that neither any FIR has been lodged/registered against the petitioner nor he has been harassed or threatened as alleged by him. In view of the above statements, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the official respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioner with further direction to perform their duties and functions strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
